name: testrix
description: Testrix — Angular + Electron desktop shell scaffold
author: Testrix contributors

scripts.build: npm run sync:brand && ng build --configuration production && npm run electron:bundle
scripts.build:pack: npm run sync:brand && ng build --configuration pack && npm run electron:bundle
scripts.electron:build:win:payload: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run build:pack && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win dir --publish never && node scripts/embed-win-icon.mjs
scripts.electron:build:win:payload:release: npm run build:pack && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win dir --publish never && node scripts/embed-win-icon.mjs
scripts.electron:build:win:setup: npm run installer:windows-assets && cd installer-shell && npm install && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run pack:win
scripts.electron:build:win:setup:release: npm run installer:windows-assets && cd installer-shell && npm install && npm run pack:win
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run electron:build:win:payload && node scripts/sync-installer-payload.mjs --platform=win && npm run electron:build:win:setup && node scripts/finalize-win-installer.mjs
scripts.electron:build:win:release: npm run electron:build:win:payload:release && node scripts/sync-installer-payload.mjs --platform=win && npm run electron:build:win:setup:release && node scripts/finalize-win-installer.mjs && node scripts/sign-win-release.mjs
